routeA.title: 01. New Addington
paragraphs: It started a long time ago in New Addington. Life was chaotic back then, but you were always a safe space. You made sure I was fed, looked after Snowey, and always showed up for our meet-ups.
You were there for me even when I was lying—and you absolutely knew I was. You were the anchor I didn't know I needed.

routeA.title: 02. Frozen Nights
paragraphs: I still laugh thinking about freezing in the rain on that moped. But my favorite memories are the quiet ones. Endless nights watching Siren.
Just standing there, looking in the mirror together. Those simple moments meant the world to me then, and they mean even more now.

routeA.title: 03. The High Ground
paragraphs: Remember the Call of Duty Zombies marathons? Surviving round after round on the phone until the sun came up. We were a team before we even knew how to be one in real life.
Even when the world felt heavy, those games and those calls were a little bubble where everything felt okay.

routeA.title: 04. The Keepsakes
paragraphs: Finding out you kept those old GHDs—and that little heart with the 'R' on your finger—made me smile. It was like a sign that the story wasn't quite over.
It showed me that even when we were walking different paths, a piece of us stayed behind. I’ve never forgotten that.

routeA.title: 05. Growing Up
paragraphs: Watching you break cycles for Lucien while I do the same for Jayjay and Ryan makes me so incredibly proud. We had to learn how to be parents on our own.
We grew up, we changed, and we learned that being an anchor for someone else is the most important job we’ll ever have.

routeA.title: 06. The Corner
paragraphs: You’re an absolute ray of sunshine, Tonii. No matter how much time passes, I’m just grateful to be in your corner, whenever you need a friend.

Thank you for being part of my future, and for letting me be part of yours.
Ronnie x

routeB.title: 01. Reconnecting
paragraphs: When I sent that message in April, I expected nothing back. I just wanted to say I was genuinely sorry for the person I used to be.
But then you replied. Hearing you say you had no bad feelings and wishing me nothing but healing ✨ was a weight off my shoulders.

routeB.title: 02. Happiness
paragraphs: I remember what I told you. I work hard and I treat my kids good. I want to do everything just to make you smile.
I do it as much for me as I do for you, because seeing you happy is the best thing about my day. It’s a peace I don’t want to lose.

routeB.title: 03. Providing
paragraphs: I love being in a position where I can look after you. Sending you that money for your food made me feel good—it was about knowing you were sorted while you were out.
Being able to provide and take that stress away is exactly why I work hard. I'll always have your back.

routeB.title: 04. Support
paragraphs: I was so glad when the delivery for your son's new clothes finally came through. Seeing you relieved and able to go to bed happy was the best news.
Your peace of mind is important to me. If the house is calm and you're sleeping well, then everything is going right.

routeB.title: 05. Present
paragraphs: The "No Apologies" rule is now law. If you break it, you have to pick a completely random emoji and send it with zero context. I'm ready for the chaos.
We've both done a lot of healing. It feels good to just be present, without any of the old weight hanging over us.

routeB.title: 06. Energy
paragraphs: I love the peace we have now. No pressure, no expectations. Just sharing TikToks and knowing we're there for each other.

Thank you for letting me back in, Tonii. Let’s just keep this good energy going. You know I'll never miss a message.
Ronnie x

ourSongChapter.title: 07. Our Song
paragraphs: I made this track for you and for this story—something you can hit play on whenever you want it in the background.
No pressure, just us. Tonii & Ronnie
